content.full_text:
August 22, 1990

Mr. Scott Hallaprin  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Ste. 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Scott:

In a telephone conversation with staff, you indicated that, as a cosponsor of Prop 73, I may use my campaign funds to pay for attorney's fees in connection with litigation regarding Proposition 73.

I would appreciate your written confirmation of the above stated information. Thank you for your time and attention.

Sincerely yours,

[Signature]
QUENTIN L. KOPP

QLK:ml
